privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated from a Python script embedded in setup_task.sh. The dataset contains exactly 200 booking records with 8 intentional duplicates (208 total), 50 member profiles, and 4 penalty rules. The booking data spans 90 days starting from 2024-01-01, with class times at six different hours (06:00, 08:00, 12:00, 17:00, 18:00, 19:00). Penalties are configured as: 2-hour grace period for cancellations, 2 strikes for WARNING status, 3 strikes for RESTRICTED status, and a 30-day rolling window for strike counting. The data includes deliberate quality issues: 8 duplicate booking records, name formatting inconsistencies (lowercase, uppercase, extra spaces), and missing/empty cancellation timestamps. Bookings are distributed as 70% attended, 15% no-show, 10% timely cancel, and 5% late cancel. Members have demographic attributes across 5 age groups and 4 membership types, enabling fairness analysis.
